channel.title: Garrison Keillor Archive - News from Lake Wobegon
channel.itunes:summary: Thanks to my fiance's spectacular (and nearly all out of print) Garrison Keillor audio collection, we thus begin a series of Garrison Keillor Archives from 1989. Contains many excellent and classic recitations by Mr. Keillor. Internet Archive'd by Drew Evan Dobbs.
channel.description: Thanks to my fiance's spectacular (and nearly all out of print) Garrison Keillor audio collection, we thus begin a series of Garrison Keillor Archives from 1989. Contains many excellent and classic recitations by Mr. Keillor. Internet Archive'd by Drew Evan Dobbs.

item.title: A Day in the Life of Clarence Bunsen
The Tollefson Boy Goes to College
Mrs Bergey and the Schubert Carillon Piano
New Years Eve from New York
Meeting Donny Hart at the Bus Stop
A Day at the Circus with Mazumbo
Buddy Holly and the Pharaohs of Rhythm
Cafe Boeuf Secrets of the Kitchen
